## What are Technical Assessments?

Technical assessments are a combination of application-based techniques and knowledge-based questions employed to measure an employee's understanding of concepts, tools and frameworks on a required technical skill or technology. A technical exam is comprehensive, insightful and efficient at screening multiple candidates simultaneously.

* * *

## Frequently asked questions (FAQs)

A technical assessment test is one that evaluates the job knowledge and domain expertise of prospective hires. The tests cover a wide range of corporate functions (HR, sales, marketing, etc) and industries (retail, BPO, law, etc). Technical assessment tests also measure technical skills such as coding, software testing, data science, software development, etc.

Technical skills can be evaluated using role-based assessments. Mercer | Mettl has an exhaustive list of competencies and sub-competencies based on job function, role, level and industry. Our subject matter experts curate customized assessments as per organizational needs and enable employers to efficiently evaluate the technical skills of your workforce.

You can prepare for a technical exam in the following ways:

* Read the job description carefully
 
* Evaluate your skills against the job requirements
 
* Deep dive into the company’s services
 
* Brush up relevant technical skills
 
* Practice online technical assessments
